## What's broken

A clear description of what's happening that shouldn't be.

## What actually happens

## Screenshots / GIFs

If the bug is visual, attach a screenshot or short GIF. The K-OS aesthetic depends on pixel-correct rendering, so visual bugs need visual evidence.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Linux, macOS, Windows, Steam Deck, Miyoo Mini)
- Browser: (e.g. Firefox 145, Chrome 132, Safari 18)
- K-OS commit / version: (run `git log -1 --oneline` if you cloned, or paste the URL of the demo)
- Audio working in other apps? (yes/no — helps narrow Tone.js issues)

## Anything else

Other context, related issues, hunches about the cause.
